summary: Client-scoped navigation testing for Contracts and Invoices screens - All features verified working. Navigation flow: Dashboard -> Clients -> Client Detail -> Contracts/Invoices works correctly. Both screens show client-specific data filtering, client-name context in headers, and have back buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: ProviderContracts.tsx correctly filters contracts by clientId when isClientScoped is true (line 103-105)
ProviderInvoices.tsx correctly filters invoices by clientId when isClientScoped is true (line 88-91)
Both components display client-scoped header with format: '{clientName}'s Contracts/Invoices'
Back button uses router.back() for proper expo-router navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client-scoped navigation for Contracts and Invoices is fully implemented and working. The flow is: Dashboard -> Clients tab -> Click client -> Client Detail -> Quick Actions (Contract/Invoice buttons) -> Client-scoped Contracts/Invoices screen.

contracts_client_scoped_navigation.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Emma Johnson's Contracts' header with 'Client Contracts' subtitle, filtered data showing only Emma's contracts

contracts_data_filtering.evidence: Only contracts for selected client (Emma Johnson) are displayed - shows 1 signed contract for $1800

contracts_header_shows_client_context.evidence: Header displays 'Emma Johnson's Contracts' with 'Client Contracts' subtitle

contracts_back_button_visible.evidence: Arrow-back icon visible in header (uses router.back() for navigation)

invoices_client_scoped_navigation.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Emma Johnson's Invoices' header with 'Client Invoices' subtitle

invoices_data_filtering.evidence: Only invoices for selected client (Emma Johnson) are displayed - shows INV-9353 ($1,800.00, Paid)

invoices_header_shows_client_context.evidence: Header displays 'Emma Johnson's Invoices' with 'Client Invoices' subtitle

client_detail_quick_actions.evidence: Client Detail screen shows Contract and Invoice quick action buttons that navigate with clientId/clientName params

steps: 3. Select client (e.g., Emma Johnson) from list
4. On Client Detail, click 'Contract' or 'Invoice' quick action
5. View client-scoped screen with filtered data
6. Back button available to return to Client Detail

screenshots_taken: step2_clients_list.png - Clients list showing 7 Active Clients
step3_client_detail.png - Emma Johnson's client detail with Quick Actions

code_implementation_notes.ProviderContracts.tsx: Uses useLocalSearchParams to get clientId/clientName, filters contracts array when isClientScoped is true
code_implementation_notes.ProviderInvoices.tsx: Uses useLocalSearchParams to get clientId/clientName, filters invoices array when isClientScoped is true
code_implementation_notes.ProviderClientDetail.tsx: handleQuickAction passes clientId and clientName via URL params when navigating to contracts/invoices
